description_long: This house features a sprawling, single-story layout with multiple interconnected rectangular sections, each topped with a distinct metal roof. The exterior walls are predominantly dark, contrasted by large, white-framed windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. A prominent covered porch with supporting columns and a set of steps marks the main entrance, while a secondary section with a slatted roof suggests a carport or utility area. The rooflines vary in height and orientation, creating a dynamic, layered appearance typical of modern ranch-style homes. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from wood and metal, with ample window space for natural light. The overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story house with multiple metal roof sections, dark exterior walls, and large white-framed windows. Features include a covered porch with columns and a slatted-roof carport area.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side and rear of the house, showing the layered metal roofs and a slatted-roof section, likely a carport or utility area.
description_view_1: The front of the house is visible, featuring the main entryway with steps, a covered porch, and a prominent roof overhang.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the covered porch with columns, the main entrance steps, and a symmetrical arrangement of windows along the facade.
description_view_3: The rear and side of the house are shown, with a clear view of the metal roofing and a series of evenly spaced windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with columns, a set of steps, and a prominent overhang.
